title: Shedinja's Stance [Cobblemon]
description: Adds a new signature move for Shedinja
body:
This datapack allows Shedinja, at level 1, to have its own move called "Shedinja's Stance" which badly poisons the target while also lowering both defense and special defense.

Works on Cobblemon 1.7.x

**THIS IS A DATAPACK AND A RESOURCE PACK**
**PUT INTO RESOURCE PACK FOR LANG FIX**
